title: 12th Pass Jobs 2026 – Program Associate I
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Program Associate I. Candidates with B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Gandhinagar official website.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Program Associate I. Candidates with B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Gandhinagar official website.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline, B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Program Associate I: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline. OR B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Program Associate I post at IIT Gandhinagar is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Program Associate I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Program Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar as per the official notification.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Program Associate I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA or equivalent, or a B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB with 4 years of experience. Minimum 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are also required.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Program Associate I role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Program Associate I position is 35 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Program Associate I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Program Associate I post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate I jobs?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Program Associate I position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your reference.

faq.question: Does IIT Gandhinagar offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.
